thread_title: 🔥可正常使用！【翻译器】介绍及使用教程！Channel 【Translator function】introduction and usage tutorial！
🔥可正常使用！【翻译器】介绍及使用教程！Channel 【Translator function】introduction and usage tutorial！

content:
守密人你好：
       彌薩格大學校務處將於3月17日21:35進行校內設施修復，更新完成後您將得到通知，重新進入遊戲。對於更新可能給大家帶來的不便，我們會準備一份補給物資以示歉意。祝大家調查順利！ 
  
【補給物資】
在線維護補償：銀芯*50
  
【領取條件】
領取時間截至2025年3月31日23:59。請記得及時前往郵箱領取補給物資哦。  
 
【更新內容】
● 調整了將於 3 月 18 日 9:00 開放的「相位逆轉」活動的任務獎勵： 在「相位對弈」中每打出 25 張卡牌後獲得的魔法橡果從 10 提升為 30。
● 修復了相位對弈中喚醒體「珊」的技能「珊瑚螺旋」對第二個目標的攻擊次數錯誤的問題。
● 修復了相位對弈中命輪「真理之門」的描述：打出裝備者的技能卡後，抽 1 張裝備者的技能卡，每回合至多生效 1 次，實際效果不變。
● 修復了相位對弈試訓模式無法裝備命輪的問題。
● 修復了語言非簡中時喚醒體「哈姆林」狂氣爆發「原初的樂音」描述顯示為簡體中文的問題。
● 修復了非中文語言中，「喚醒詳情」中「限定」沒有被翻譯的問題。

V2.1.1.3 Online Maintenance Notice
 
Dear Keeper,
    The Mythag University Administration Office will conduct facility repairs on March 17 at 21:35(UTC+8). You will be notified once the update is complete and can re-enter the game. We apologize for any inconvenience this may cause and will provide a supply package as compensation. Happy investigating!
    
【Supply Package】
Maintenance Compensation: Silver*50
    
【Claim Conditions】
Claim period ends on March 31 2025(UTC+8), at 23:59. Please remember to check your mailbox to claim the supply package.
     
【Update Content】
● Adjusted the task rewards for the "Phase Reversal" event opening on March 18 at 9:00: In "Traphase", the magic acorns received after playing 25 cards have been increased from 10 to 30.
● Fixed the issue where the skill "Coral Spiral" of the awaker "Sanga" in Traphase incorrectly attacked the second target.
● Fixed the description of the wheel of destiny "Gate of Truth" in Traphase: After playing the skill card of the equipped character, draw 1 skill card of the equipped character, effective up to once per turn, with no change to the actual effect.
● Fixed the issue where the wheel of destiny could not be equipped in Traphase trial mode.
● Fixed the issue where the description of the exalt "Primal Melody" of the awaker "Hameln" was displayed in Simplified Chinese when the language was not Simplified Chinese.
● Fixed the issue where "Limited" in "Awakening Details" was not translated in non-Chinese languages.
